JV Launch Case StudY:
DeiRdre Fay
Module 7
About Deirdre Fay…
• Deirdre has been a therapist in private practice
for twenty-five years specializing in healing PTSD;
is an author of 4 books, as well as training
professionals internationally.
Market / Niche…
• Health
• Transforming suffering into compassion
• Personal transformation through psycho-
educational courses, audios, and books
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. All rights reserved. 	2
Program…
• Living UnTriggered: Healing Trauma with
Meditation Skills
• Everyday life problems, even painful trauma
symptoms, are ones that meditation skills can
help you release
• Online Course with Deirdre Fay
Background…
• First did a Seed Launch to create this course
• Built the program over 4 weeks (plus a bonus
webinar)
• Had a list of 2500
• Made 69 sales
• Seed Launch Price: $269
• Total Revenue: $18,214
For this JV Launch…
• Had 9 JV Partners
• 5 JV partners made a sale
• #1 had 29 sales (the affiliate with the smallest
list)
• #2 had 4 sales
• #3 and #4 and 3 sales each
• #5 had 1 sale
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. All rights reserved. 	3
List Size…
• List at the beginning of launch: 7,880
• End of launch: 11,847 (50% increase)
• Launch List at start of Launch (from evergreen
Opt-in list building campaign and other): 3,317
• Launch List at end of launch: 6,388 (90% larger)
Results…
• Total Sales:108 ($397 = $42,876)
• Total JV Sales: 35 (Paid $6,950 in commission)
• Total FB Ad sales: 27 (Paid $5k to acquire)
• Total Refunds: 8
• Total after refunds: 100 sales = $39,700
• Revenue after ad spend and commissions:
$27,750
Launch Team…
• Deirdre Fay (Therapist Entrepreneur)
• JV Affiliate Manager
• Facebook Ads Manager
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 17 --

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. All rights reserved. 	4
Affiliate Recruitment…
• All affiliates were people that she knew
personally, who she had engaged with or
connected with professionally through non-
internet relationships
• Last year (for another launch) she tried working
with people who didn’t have a digital presence
and that “was pretty much worthless” so this year
she focused on people who had some digital
savvy
Affiliate Support…
• She used SamCart’s affiliate software
• She created her own password protect page on
her website for affiliates with information on:
• How to navigate the SamCart affiliate portal
• Important Launch dates/schedule
• Social Media images and instructions on how to
post w/affiliate link
Affiliate Support…
• Jack (her JV manager) handled the email
correspondence
• The JV email correspondence was very personal,
reaching out to each JV partner personally
• Deirdre and Jack created a short appreciation
video and sent it to their partners during the
launch
• They also sent personalized gift baskets
• They sent generic swipe copy (a “do differently”
for their next launch – send more personalized
swipe)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 4 of 17 --

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. All rights reserved. 	5
A-ha lesson learned…
• The affiliate with the most sales had the smallest
list…
• Because this person wrote emails that were
personal, about why she was behind Deirdre,
what she had learned from her, and why she
was promoting her
Lessons learned…
• “That we’re partnering with people in a win-win
relationship. We want to create raving fans out of
our affiliates by supporting them fully, and by
valuing their contributions to us. We see it as a
mutually beneficial relationship. “
• “To break the scarcity model that some affiliates
have; that is, if they support us there won’t be
enough for them instead of coming to see that
abundance is mutual.”
• “Stay in our hearts and not engage with one-
upping behaviors.”
Lessons learned…
• “JVs can definitely increase the list size even
though they don’t bring in sales. “
• “We’ve changed the cookies to keep them for a
year so that future launches can be success for
JVs that didn’t do as well this time.”
• “We provided our affiliates with generic emails.
Next time we will provide more relationally
specific emails and coach affiliates on how to
personalize their messaging so increase
engagement and sales.”
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 5 of 17 --

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. All rights reserved. 	6
Lessons learned…
• “We need to coach our partners more specifically
about what they can expect based on how they
communicate with their list and how often they
do so.“
• “Our JV affiliate manager reached out to all the
affiliates after the launch to invite them to call
him so he could coach them on how to
generate more sales in the future.”
• “He’s had a number of them schedule time with
him.”
Overview of Launch Process…
• Leading up to the launch she put up a landing
page and opt-in offer to start building a launch
list
• Sent some paid traffic to it (FB Ads) in the couple
of months leading up to the launch
Prelaunch was traditional Sideways Sales
Letter…
• PLC1 > 	PLC2 	> 	PLC > Webinar to
Open Cart
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 7 of 17 --

JV Emails and Communications
Launch: Living UnTriggered: Healing Trauma with Meditation Skills
PERSONALIZED - First touch email
(Name),
It’s a pleasure to meet you virtually and we’re thrilled you’re on board for the upcoming July
launch of Deirdre’s online course “Living UnTriggered: Healing Trauma with Meditation Skills”!
I'm following up on Deirdre's email from a couple of weeks ago. I trust you received the invite to
access her 'Safely Embodied' course? Please LMK if not and I'll resend.
Thank you for being part of this. You’ll be offering your tribe something of value and also making
some money to support your own efforts. We already have a number of affiliates onboard from
several different countries and adding more as we go. If it’s OK by you I’ll be checking in via
email each week now through the end of the launch. Most of the emails will be short and sweet.
The way we like to do affiliate launches is to work with you so you’re comfortable. If you’re
comfortable sending a dedicated email, great. If not, having you mention the upcoming launch
as part of your overall communications is wonderful. You know what works best for you – and
for the people you serve. We’ll give you plenty of options (email, social media, etc.) down the
road and you can pick and choose.
So that we can support you in reaching your list, it can be helpful to us (if you’re comfortable
sharing) to let us know:
- how many people you plan to market this offer to? [we understand that might not be your
complete list]
- are you anticipating doing any social media to support this offer?
The reason we’re asking is this will help us know how well our marketing is working, whether we
need to make tweaks during the launch, and to help you convert more so we can send you
more money!
We’re putting together a proposed launch calendar, an affiliate portal, and building the
communications. Please know, I’m always available by email (email address) or phone (phone
number) whenever a question or concern may arise. I’m open to adjusting my game so it best
suits you.
Looking forward to collaborating! And again, THANK YOU for being part of this.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 8 of 17 --

Jack
(email address & website)
p.s. If you know anyone else that you think has a network that might be a fit please LMK.
PERSONALIZED - Check in Email #2
(Name),
Hope you had a safe and fun Fourth! Just following up on my 6/27 email below...if a phone call
works, great, if not that's fine too.
I do have some fresh information to share about the launch.
The first email we'll be sending about the launch, and that you can send to your tribe as you see
fit, will be inviting people to a free video series. Attached is a sample that gives you a sense of
the first free video in the series. We haven't finalized the email that will go out with the series'
invite but the attached doc will give you a flavor for the video's introduction. I will send you the
actual email as soon as it's finalized; should be within the next five days. The email itself is
slated to go out to our audiences, and whatever of your audiences you desire, on or around July
15.
I've also provided a link here to the course sales page, also under construction; this won't be
released until the start of open cart (July 26) but will give you a strong sense of the course
material:
(link)
I'll be reaching out to you again within the next five days with the email copy referenced above.
Please don't hesitate to share any questions or concerns.
Thanks!
Jack

Email for affiliates after cart closed
SUBJECT: Deirdre Fay’s ‘Living UnTriggered’ course: affiliate next step now that registration
closed
Hi (name),
Hope this finds you well. Now that registration is closed, and the course has started, it’s time for
next steps.
First, our most successful affiliate in terms of sales had 27 orders. And not even remotely the
largest list among our nine affiliates. Wow. I’d be happy to debrief with you as you wish to talk
about why this affiliate had such phenomenal success. Obviously I will maintain that affiliate’s
confidentiality but I can certainly share the techniques that contributed to their success. That
way, if we decide to collaborate on future affiliate efforts (and I do hope we do!), we can
leverage these lessons learned and hopefully bring in more money for you.
Second, the deadline for refunds is Thursday, August 9, 2018.
By Tuesday, August 14 I will send you an email confirming the final status of your tribe’s
purchases including the number of sales by your tribe, the total amount of sales, and the 50%
amount due to you.
To that end, I’d like to re-confirm, based on your pre-launch directive, how we will pay you.
I have down that you’d like to be paid via check made out to (company name)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 14 of 17 --

second payment if/when it comes in.
Please let me know if you’d like to debrief by phone or if you have any questions or concerns.
Thanks, Jack
